query: SELECT DISTINCT ON (seriesName) title, imageUrl, seriesName FROM works WHERE imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageUrl != '' AND seriesName IN ('Alignment', 'Vestige', 'Covenant', 'Big Bang', 'Thr3e') ORDER BY seriesName, dateCreated DESC;
